notes: London and Seoul sessions do not overlap: Seoul closes before London opens, so a same-calendar-day FTSE return reflects information SK Hynix had not yet traded on. The contemporaneous Pearson therefore understates the true linkage, which SK Hynix absorbs at its next open.
Both series are local-currency price indices, FTSE 100 in GBP and SK Hynix in KRW; returns are in local terms and no FX leg is modelled.
